source(output(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT * FROM SalesAdjust.dbo.Finance_Other_Adj_SalesType_Failed_SQL_Validation',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource sink(input(
		Loc_ID as string,
		Order_ID as string,
		Sale_Type_CD as string,
		Adjustment_Type_cd as string,
		ItemSku_Num as string,
		Sub_Order_ID as string,
		FDay_ID as string,
		Cost as string,
		Source as string,
		Program_USD_AMT as string,
		BusinessUnit_CD as string,
		Sales as string,
		BusinessDay_Dt as string,
		Customer_Account_ID as string,
		Currency as string,
		Error_Type as string,
		Fyear_ID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		Loc_ID,
		Order_ID,
		Sale_Type_CD,
		Adjustment_Type_cd,
		ItemSku_Num,
		Sub_Order_ID,
		FDay_ID,
		Cost,
		Source,
		Program_USD_AMT,
		BusinessUnit_CD,
		Sales,
		BusinessDay_Dt,
		Customer_Account_ID,
		Currency,
		Error_Type,
		Fyear_ID)) ~> Duplicates
